title: About
text: I’m a Cybersecurity Manager at a 300-person fintech firm, where I lead security operations for financial applications hosted on AWS. I also serve as a board member for a 250-person software development firm, bringing expertise in risk governance and technical security architecture.

title: About
text: I’m a Cybersecurity Manager at a 300-person fintech firm, where I lead security operations for financial applications hosted on AWS. I also serve as a board member for a 250-person software development firm, bringing expertise in risk governance and technical security architecture.

title: About
text:
Expertise
Cybersecurity & Risk Management

Threat intelligence and incident response
Network security and penetration testing
Risk assessment across cyber, operational, and financial domains
Security architecture for cloud-native financial applications

Data Analysis & Visualization

Advanced statistical modeling (Monte Carlo simulations, copula analysis, Markov models)
Interactive dashboards and reporting (R Shiny, Python)
Financial risk modeling and portfolio analysis
Network analysis and graph theory applications

Technical Skills

Languages: Python, R, SQL, Bash
Analysis Tools: R Quarto, pandas, tidyverse, matplotlib, ggplot2
Security Tools: nmap, SIEM platforms, threat intelligence frameworks
Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Git, Docker, CI/CD pipelines

title: About
text:
Focus Areas
My work sits at the intersection of:

Cybersecurity: Building robust security monitoring and threat detection systems
Quantitative Risk: Applying statistical methods to operational and financial risk
Data Visualization: Creating clear, actionable insights from complex data
Blockchain & Crypto: Analyzing cryptocurrency markets and network security

title: About
text:
Portfolio Philosophy
Each project in this portfolio demonstrates the practical application of statistical methods, security frameworks, or data visualization techniques to real-world problems in cybersecurity and risk management. I build these projects to:

Showcase technical proficiency across the full data science workflow
Explore advanced statistical and security concepts
Create reusable frameworks for risk analysis
Share knowledge with the broader security and data science communities

title: About
text:
Contact
Connect with me on LinkedIn or explore my code on GitHub.

title: Patrick Lefler
text: Bridging cybersecurity expertise with advanced statistical modeling and data visualization

title: Patrick Lefler
text:
Featured Projects


Cybersecurity & Threat Analysis
Security Incident Monitor Dashboard
Interactive R Shiny dashboard for real-time security incident monitoring and threat intelligence aggregation.
View Project →
Network Scanning Analysis
Comprehensive nmap scanning analysis with R-based visualization and statistical modeling.
View Project →
Threat Modeling with STRIDE
Implementation framework for systematic threat identification in financial applications.
View Project →


Risk Management & Financial Analysis
Credit Risk Scorecard
Machine learning workflow for credit default prediction with feature engineering and model validation.
View Project →
Tail Risk Hedging Analysis
Clayton Copula modeling for portfolio tail risk assessment and hedging strategies.
View Project →
Monte Carlo Project Simulations
Timeline and budget risk analysis using lognormal distributions for project management.
View Project →


Data Visualization & Statistical Modeling
State Financial Health Assessment
Interactive hexagon tile maps visualizing fiscal metrics across US states.
View Project →
Options Implied Volatility Calculator
Interactive tool for options pricing and Greeks calculation with real-time visualization.
View Project →
Blockchain Data Visualization
Network analysis and visualization of Bitcoin transaction patterns and network health metrics.
View Project →

title: Patrick Lefler
text:
Technical Writing
Recent articles on cybersecurity and risk management:

Shift-Left Security Economics: Cost-benefit analysis of early-stage security integration
Insider Threat Detection with Markov Models: Statistical approaches to behavioral anomaly detection
Bitcoin Halving Mechanisms: Analysis of monetary policy and network effects

View all articles on Medium →

text:

I create technical content on cybersecurity, risk management, and data visualization.
LinkedIn | GitHub | Medium
